user.title: Home Maintenance Manager
user.description: Create the Home Maintenance Manager integration. Tasks can be added from Options after setup.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Home Maintenance Manager instance is allowed.

init.title: Maintenance task editor
init.description: {task_count} UI task(s) are configured. Choose an action, then choose Save and reload when finished.

confirm_delete.title: Confirm delete
confirm_delete.description: Delete {task_name}? This removes the UI task definition and its task entities after reload.

task_basic.title: Task basics
task_basic.description: Create the maintenance task device and link it to Home Assistant entities.

task_rules.title: Due rules
task_rules.description: Enter rules as JSON. Supported rule types: time, runtime, counter.

task_details.title: Instructions, checklist, parts, and tools
task_details.description: Instructions support Markdown. Checklist and parts are JSON arrays.

import_json.title: Import/replace UI tasks
import_json.description: Paste a JSON array of task definitions. This replaces UI-created tasks, not YAML tasks.

error.duplicate_task_id: Another task already uses this task ID.
error.invalid_json: This field must contain valid JSON.
